description: Tasks template for modernization plan. Generate this file alongside plan.md to track individual migration tasks.

tasks.description: Upgrade the application from Spring Boot 2.7.18 and Java 8 to Spring Boot 3.x and Java 17
tasks.reason: Java 8 and Spring Boot 2.x are end-of-life and prohibited per the Acme Corp Modernization Playbook hard boundaries. Upgrading to Spring Boot 3.x and Java 17 (LTS) is a mandatory prerequisite for all subsequent migration tasks.
tasks.requirements: Upgrade from Spring Boot 2.7.18 and Java 8 to Spring Boot 3.x (latest stable) and Java 17 (LTS) as required by the Acme Corp targets.md. Migrate all javax.* imports to jakarta.* for Jakarta EE compatibility. Ensure all existing tests continue to pass after the upgrade.

tasks.description: Migrate the application's data layer from Oracle DB to PostgreSQL
tasks.reason: The application currently uses Oracle DB (ojdbc8). The user has requested migration to Azure Database for PostgreSQL, which requires replacing Oracle-specific SQL, dialects, and the JDBC driver with PostgreSQL equivalents.
tasks.requirements: Replace the Oracle JDBC driver (ojdbc8) with the PostgreSQL JDBC driver. Update JPA/Hibernate dialect settings to PostgreSQL. Migrate Oracle-specific SQL syntax and sequences to PostgreSQL-compatible equivalents. Ensure schema and data compatibility.

tasks.description: Configure Managed Identity authentication for Azure Database for PostgreSQL
tasks.reason: Per the Acme Corp Modernization Playbook, all service-to-service authentication must use Managed Identity and hardcoded credentials are prohibited. Password-based database connections must be replaced with credential-free Managed Identity authentication.
tasks.requirements: Replace password-based database authentication with Azure Managed Identity for Azure Database for PostgreSQL. Remove hardcoded credentials from application.yml / application.properties. Configure the application to obtain access tokens using Managed Identity for database connections to Azure Database for PostgreSQL in the public cloud.
